name: Quiche Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut small rounds from the corn tortillas, about the size of a muffin tin.
2. Place the tortilla rounds in the bottom of a baking dish.
3. Sprinkle half of the grated Jack cheese and all of the Cheddar cheese over the rounds.
4. Scatter the green chilies, black olive slices, and diced tomatoes over the cheese.
5. In a bowl, beat together the eggs, sour cream, and cumin until well combined.
6. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the cheese and other toppings.
7. Sprinkle the remaining Cheddar cheese on top.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 45 minutes, or until set.
9. Serve warm.
